revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-035

Alternative term: Maximum demand

The greatest value of an average load in a given interval of time that is significantly longer than the interval used to define the average load.

{{IALAFooter}}
